lesson.menu_desc: Meeting a colleague at an international congress -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally -- Meeting a Colleague at the Congress
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcos Mansour | Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Valuation Congress here in Washington. My name is Helen, and I am one of the event hosts. The opening session starts at ten o'clock in the main hall. Throughout the day, we have talks on appraisal standards, the global market, and new technology in the field. Many appraisers and partners from across the Americas are here today. Please introduce yourself to new people, share your business card, and build new connections. If you need any help, our team is at the front desk. Have a wonderful congress.
